signals.headline: **Policy outlook**: The central bank remains vigilant about currency volatility and the inflationary impact of a weak wo
signals.raw:
**Policy outlook**: The central bank remains vigilant about currency volatility and the inflationary impact of a weak won, with the won recently rising to around 1,520 won per U.S. dollar[4].

No newer inflation data has been announced since the March reading. Market participants would be watching for signals about whether the Bank of Korea will maintain its current policy stance or adjust course
